name: libperlio-gzip-perl
title: libperlio-gzip-perl
summary: module providing a PerlIO layer to gzip/gunzip
description:
module providing a PerlIO layer to gzip/gunzip
PerlIO::gzip is a Perl module that provides a PerlIO layer for manipulating
files in the format used by the gzip program. Compression and decompression
are both implemented, but cannot be used simultaneously (i.e. files cannot
be opened for both reading and writing).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libperlio-gzip-perl because module providing a PerlIO layer to gzip/gunzip.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libperlio-gzip-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libperlio-gzip-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libperlio-gzip-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
